subcodes.first_line: O Thou Whose mention is the solace of longing hearts, Whose Name is the beloved of faithful souls, Whose praise is cherished by them that are nigh unto Thee, and Whose Countenance is the goal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ذکرک انیس قلوب المشتاقین و اسمک حبیب افئده المخلصین و ثنائک محبوب المقربین و وجهک مقصد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @pain of love; love as veil, @suffering and imprisonment, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
